/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC  -g -std=c++11 -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libmytinymuduo.so -o /data1/xby/xby1/MyTinymuduo/lib/libmytinymuduo.so CMakeFiles/mytinymuduo.dir/net/Acceptor.o CMakeFiles/mytinymuduo.dir/net/Buffer.o CMakeFiles/mytinymuduo.dir/net/Channel.o CMakeFiles/mytinymuduo.dir/net/DefaultPoller.o CMakeFiles/mytinymuduo.dir/net/EPollPoller.o CMakeFiles/mytinymuduo.dir/net/EventLoop.o CMakeFiles/mytinymuduo.dir/net/EventLoopThread.o CMakeFiles/mytinymuduo.dir/net/EventLoopThreadPool.o CMakeFiles/mytinymuduo.dir/net/InetAddress.o CMakeFiles/mytinymuduo.dir/net/Poller.o CMakeFiles/mytinymuduo.dir/net/Socket.o CMakeFiles/mytinymuduo.dir/net/TcpConnection.o CMakeFiles/mytinymuduo.dir/net/TcpServer.o CMakeFiles/mytinymuduo.dir/base/CurrentThread.o CMakeFiles/mytinymuduo.dir/base/Logger.o CMakeFiles/mytinymuduo.dir/base/Thread.o CMakeFiles/mytinymuduo.dir/base/Timestamp.o
